company.name: Professional Services Firm | Vincents
company.description:
# Professional Services Firm | Vincents

![](https://vincents.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/50.png)

#### Good news for buyers – surge in homes hitting the market

Australian housing listings rise gives first home buyers more choice and negotiating power — here's what rising listings mean for your plans

[Read More](https://vincents.com.au/good-news-for-buyers-surge-in-homes-hitting-the-market)

#### Fringe Benefits Tax 2026 | Key Changes, Reminders and How to Stay Compliant

Here’s what you need to know about the 2026 Fringe Benefit Tax changes, recent cases, as well as ATO guidance and audit ‘hot spots’.

[Read More](https://vincents.com.au/fringe-benefits-tax-2026-key-changes-reminders-and-how-to-stay-compliant)

#### Market on Edge: Iran Tensions Drive Volatility

In this episode we unpack Iran tensions shaking markets, ASX results, commodity moves and why a defensive investment approach matters now.

[Read More](https://vincents.com.au/market-on-edge-iran-tensions-drive-volatility)

#### Double trouble! RBA lifts cash rate by another 25 basis points to 4.10%

Understand the RBA rate rise impact on your mortgage. See how the latest cash rate increase could affect your monthly home loan repayments.

[Read More](https://vincents.com.au/double-trouble-rba-lifts-cash-rate-by-another-25-basis-points-to-4-10)

#### Offset accounts surge as homeowners race to beat higher rates

Discover how an offset account can help you reduce mortgage interest, save on your home loan, and pay off your mortgage faster.

[Read More](https://vincents.com.au/offset-accounts-surge-as-homeowners-race-to-beat-higher-rates)

company.name: Regenerative Medicine | Bruder Consulting & Venture Group
company.description:
# Regenerative Medicine | Bruder Consulting & Venture Group

## CATALYZING  
YOUR SUCCESS 

Regenerative Medicine  -   Biologics  -  Tissue Repair  -  Biomaterials

![Blue Curve Strip.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/a9f6c5_311eea699c1d4fcfa77f645b78e32092~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_0,y_0,w_3376,h_786/fill/w_1439,h_335,al_c,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Blue%20Curve%20Strip.png)

#### The BCVG Difference

"We leverage extensive domain expertise, Integrated Insights™ and industry relationships to deliver customized strategic guidance and tactical solutions."

​

Scott P. Bruder, MD, PhD

Bruder Consulting & Venture Group (BCVG)

![Scott Circle.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/a9f6c5_d1057ef8990c4f78be4cb97a9bef741d~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_276,h_316,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Scott%20Circle.png)

![Blue Curve Strip.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/a9f6c5_2255ac8fda9440ffa7c1207ec2078358~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_2500,h_335,al_c,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Blue%20Curve%20Strip.png)

#### WHO WE ARE

The Bruder Consulting & Venture Group is comprised of three complementary resources:

*   A Core Team of personnel with extensive industry experience
    
*   Affiliate Firms whose expertise complements our own
    
*   Special Advisors who are world-renown experts from the academic research and clinical communities
    

Combined Years of Industry Experience

#### 350+

## I want to accelerate the growth or differentiation of my business

## I want to acquire, sell or diligence an asset or business

#### OUR CLIENT BASE

Our client partners include medical device, biotech, and cell therapy firms located in the United States and around the world.

50%

of client partners are outside the USA

$2B

in represented transactions

$2B

in represented transactions

#### MONTHLY NEWSLETTER

January 2026

New year, new milestones

Happy New Year from all of us at DHC Regenerative Medicine. Wherever you are, whatever you celebrate, we hope your holiday season was peaceful and restorative.

#### ACADEMIC AND INDUSTRY PRESENCE

![Microphone Closeup](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/08fd4587c5c9414c8ff963a9e538e849.jpg/v1/fill/w_386,h_290,q_75,enc_avif,quality_auto/08fd4587c5c9414c8ff963a9e538e849.jpg)

company.name: Holt Consulting Company, LLC
company.description:
# Holt Consulting Company, LLC

The Consultant of Choice for Aviation and Surface Transportation Projects Across the Southeast

 ![](https://www.holtconsultingco.com/uploads/images/_resize/DJI_0044-min2_resize_993bf2ca9dd3c6c81a52aa14ead99aac.JPG)

## About Holt

Holt is a multi-discipline engineering firm that provides superior planning, design, and management services for clients in need of transportation infrastructure. State and local governments turn to our team of specialists for the technical accuracy, memorable client service, and matchless value they receive.

Established by long-time friends and co-workers, our culture was founded on relationships and continues to put people first, meaning both our clients and our employees. At Holt, you will find the capabilities and experience of a large company, coupled with the sincerity and approachability of a small company.

We are committed to our goal of being caring service professionals that empower others to succeed, all while doing our part to enhance the communities around us through meaningful and innovative transportation solutions.
